name: SkillForge
description: An intelligent meta-skill and skill creation methodology for Claude Code and Codex. Analyzes any input to recommend existing skills, improve them, or create new ones using a multi-phase process with 11 thinking lenses, regression questioning, and a synthesis panel. Includes scaffold scripts, validation tools, and reference documentation.

findings_summary.notes: High-quality meta-skill with excellent documentation. The SKILL.md is well-structured (313 lines after v5.0 optimization) with clear frontmatter including name, description, model specification, allowed-tools list (Read, Glob, Grep, Write, Edit only), and user-invocable flag. Helper Python scripts (init_skill.py, validate-skill.py, package_skill.py, discover_skills.py, quick_validate.py, triage_skill_request.py) are local-only tools for skill scaffolding and validation. check_docs_safety.py is a safety checker. No network calls, no hooks, no dangerous patterns. The .skillignore file and packaging safety hardening (v5.1) show security awareness. Comprehensive reference documentation in references/ folder. MIT licensed. Top-tier example of skill engineering best practices.
